metadata.title: Vote in Honor of a Veteran

elements.alt: North Carolina State Board of Elections Vote Logo

elements.text: NORTH CAROLINA STATE BOARD OF ELECTIONS
VOTE IN HONOR OF A VETERAN

content.text:
P.O. Box 27255
Raleigh, NC
27611-7255
Mailing Address

The Vote in Honor of a Veteran program provides North Carolina citizens an opportunity to pay tribute to those that have served this country and protected our freedom. Honor a Veteran in upcoming Elections by requesting a pin.

elements.alt: Pin design featuring the shape of North Carolina in an American flag pattern with the text 'I'm voting in honor of a Veteran... VETERAN'S NAME HERE'

content.text:

Please feel free to reproduce this form if needed. If you have questions please contact the NC State Board of Elections by phone (919) 733-7173 or toll free 1-866-522-4723.
